rulings.Case Title: LEONILA MORTENSEN, AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR, AND AS et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Ford Motor Company'S Motion To Re-Open Discovery To Conduct The Deposition Of Charles Smoot
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, February 5, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Ford Motor Company¿s motion to re-open discovery for the limited purpose of conducting the deposition of Charles Smoot is granted. Even if Union Pacific¿s opposition is considered, the factors identified in C.C.P. 2024.050 weigh in favor of the court exercising its discretion to grant the motion. Pelton-Shepherd Industries v. Delta Packaging Products, (2008) 165 Cal.App.4th 1568, does not preclude Ford from bringing this motion. Discovery remains closed as to all other matters. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:30a.m, not 9:00a.m. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. If a tentative ruling is contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must bring the proposed order to the hearing. If a tentative ruling is not contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must either bring the proposed order to the hearing or submit it after the hearing in compliance with CRC 3.1312. = (503/TLJ)
